questionHtml:
A sample of a compound contains approximately 24.0 g C, 3.0 g H, and 1.6 g O. What is the empirical formula of the compound?

A.  C20H30O

B.  C84H10O6

C.  C2H3O

D.  C24H30O2

meta.title: A sample of a compound contains approximately 24.0 g C, 3.0 g H, and 1.6 g O. What is the empirical formula of the compound? A. C20H30O B. C84H10O6 C. C2H3O D. C24H30O2
